hotel_name: Sofitel Kia Ora Moorea Beach Resort

reviews.title: Comfortable bed but not the best location
reviews.text: The breakfast is pretty expensive, A$40. However similar with the Sofitel in Bora-Bora, the bed is first class. The lagoon is beautiful. Service is quite disappointing, our passports were held by one of the persons there for almost 2 hours whilst he were doing other things, and did not hand it in directly to us.
reviews.positives: Comfortable bed

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
A warm welcome from the Receptionist Leticia. I appreciated the cool welcome drink and hand towel on arrival and I was touched to receive the beautiful traditional Lei made with the national Tiare flower.  I arrived early and was invited to enjoy the pool and facilities until my Bungalow was ready. I even received a text when it was prepared.  I enjoyed sitting on the veranda soaking up the views, the Polynesian atmosphere and realizing a dream to visit French Polynesia had come true.  The welcome note and macarons were a very sweet thought. Being there for the National day,July 14th was a bonus.  The fireworks put on by the hotel was absolutely beautiful. The buffet breakfast was excellent and the croissants and pan au chocolat - best I’ve ever had. Congratulations to the pastry Chef.  Amazing view of crystal clear water whilst dining.
As a solo traveler one area to improve might be to remind all staff that solo travelers are just as deserving and valued as couples and families.  The spa had said they only had couple appointments available! it wasn’t made clear to me why that couldn’t be adapted.  Also a waitress in the evening said, ”your here alone?”  Solo travelers are here to explore and  have adventures too.  That said,  I want to thank you Sofitel Moorea for making my French Polynesia stay so special.

reviews.title: Generally a good stay
reviews.positives: Hotel conditions, beach, staff

reviews.title: Honeymoon
reviews.text: Good
reviews.positives: the location, the wharf dinner, boat tour

reviews.title: Lovely hotel with wonderful beach
reviews.text: Great location and good rooms with very good beach. This is the paradise. Room service need to improve.
reviews.positives: very attactive beach

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Pretty bay
reviews.negatives: Towel service tool 15 min, room was beyond needing renovation. Thought I'd fall through the floor.

reviews.title: Holiday
reviews.text: The resort grounds were very well taken care of and the staff was great. The luxury overwater bungalo I reserved was recently restored and was very nice. I asked to have one at the end of the pier for half my stay which I was charged quite a bit for. The unit was old and had birds living in the celing and they walked all night. Deffinaty not worth more money for a ran down unit. The hotel it's self has many small things that make you feel good about. Little things you normally don't get from a hotel. The location is amazing if you want to snorkel the coral and abundant fish to see was great. The only thing I didn't like was the food and drinks are way over priced and to be ho eat besides breakfast the rest of the food was horrible. If you are going to charge for gourmet it should atleast be decent. I just came from the Hilton and the food was cheaper and much better. But other than that the resort wad great much busier than the Hilton and about the same price.

reviews.title: Relaxing holiday
reviews.text: We stayed in a luxury overwater bungalow for a few nights and really enjoyed our time at this resort.  The bungalow was perfect - well decorated with comfy bed and chairs, our own balcony and dock with a freshwater shower, and a beautiful view of the water and Tahiti in the background.  The resort gardens and beach were also very nice and well maintained.  We paid a lot for the bungalow so we had high expectations for our stay and the only thing that did not meet our expectations was the staff and check in experience.  Our room was not ready at the check in time after we arrived early.  We also had to keep checking back to see when the room was ready rather than them letting us know.  By the time our room was ready, we had to wait even longer to get our bags delivered because the bell boys were "busy" delivering other bags.  I would have expected a priority check in service given we were paying for one of the most expensive rooms.  The staff were friendly but did not go out of their way to meet their customers needs.  We had to ask several times to get chair cushions delivered to our room and each person replied they would be their soon but several hours past before we got them.  In summary, it was a beautiful resort and I would recommend it to others with the caveat to not expect top service.

reviews.title: Too expensive
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives:
The additional cost for my daughter, not mentioned on Booking.com (with no additional services) 
The darkness in the bedroom

reviews.title: Beautiful place
reviews.text: This resort is an absolutely beautiful place to stay: beautiful lagoon, good breakfast, lovely bungalows, friendly and helpful staff... There were very few issues (e.g. roof of bungalow needs renovation) but apart from that it was a perfect stay.

reviews.title: See above
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Cockroaches in a room costing over $1,600 per night! And, management did nothing about it.

reviews.title: The staff is the best.
reviews.text: The hotel grounds are very beautiful, the indoor facilities are excellent, and the staff's service was also very good. I would like to stay again.

reviews.title: Great luxury escape from the main island of Tahiti
reviews.text: It was extremely busy for my check in but the staff were amazing in acknowledging I was waiting for a long time. Upgraded me and made sure I was looked after and happy.

reviews.title: Amazing Experience
reviews.text:
I had a GREAT experience staying in an overwater Bungalow at Sofitel Kia Ora. It was truly a dream! The rooms were comfy and the staff was outstanding. You could literally dive off the stairs and go snorkeling and explore.

Only things that I didn't love were the location and dining. Although it was very close to the ferry, there weren't a lot of amenties nearby outside of the resort.   We didn't leave the resort and room service was just average for the price you paid.

reviews.title: Snorkeling heaven
reviews.text: Step into 4’ Crystal. Clear water at the bottom of the steps from your over water bungalow and you will be surrounded by thousands of beautiful tropical fish and coral gardens. It’s enchanting! The same is true at the beach. We slso stayed at Four Seasons bungalows in Bora Bora.  Four Srasons bungalows were just a smidge nicer but the snorkeling on Moorea was incredible. The restaurants were better at Four Seasons but very good at Sofitel. We did a snorkeling excursion on both islands and that’s a do not miss! Star gazing from the bungalow, sunrises, sunsets, especially at Bora Bora is breathtaking.

reviews.title: Best overwater bungalows in Mo'orea
reviews.text:
The Sofitel is placed in the best beach in Moorea, great for snorkeling. Just bellow the overwater bungalows we can find healthy coral with many different fishes.
All expirence was great, staff, room, services, food and beach.

reviews.title: Couldn’t have been better!!
reviews.text: This was my first over the water bungalow stay and it was incredible. From the moment we walked in to check-in, we were treated wonderfully. And although the resort was full, it felt so peaceful and quiet all the time. The breakfast was the best I’ve ever had ANYWHERE! The room was breathtaking...waking up every morning and opening the curtains to that view was exquisite. Doing yoga on our private balcony in the morning before breakfast was also wonderful. All in all, it was a great stay. I would go back in a heartbeat. The only thing I wouldn’t do again was the dinner on the beach. It was fine but not worth the money. Just dine in the restaurants on property or go into Maharepa. Rudy’s was lovely.

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: Look no further. Location is breathtaking, staff is over the top accommodating! Christoff deserves a shout out for being the most caring, kind and attentive human alive. Thank you for making our stay one that we will never forget.

reviews.title: The resort is beautiful, but overall experience was underwhelming compared to Manava beach.
reviews.positives: The staff and breakfast buffet were exceptional.
reviews.negatives: The bed in the garden-view bungalow was very uncomfortable; like sleeping in a hammock. The entire resort is a bit secluded from food/restaurant options. You're kind of restricted to eating on site, which is very expensive and a fairly limited menu. The availability of recreational equipment (e.g., kayaks) was a bit haphazard; couldn't really schedule or reserve one, so you had to stand around and wait or the next unit would be given to whomever was present (learned this through experience).

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text: Food and service were very nice. Especially, the Polynesian dance and show were very amazing!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great over the water bungalows. Garden bungalows are also available and are not too far from the beach and water, so they might be a more affordable and still enjoyable option

reviews.title: Amazing resort
reviews.text:
Such an amazing resort. We stayed in one of the premium over water bungalows. The room was beautiful and large. 2 restaurants on site plus bars. The food is very expensive but it is everywhere in moorea/Tahiti resorts. 
Manatea at front desk was lovely - she helped us upgrade our last 2 nights to the same room. All staff were lovely & helpful. Great water sport station too.
Only downside (which is common in French Polynesian international resorts for some reason) is that all tv channels are in French and there’s no option for chrome cast etc so when it rains and you want to watch tv in English you can’t. 
Not really needed in paradise but it did rain a bit so would have been used a little!

reviews.title: A True Paradise
reviews.text: The Sofitel was the most amazing place we've stayed in all of our travels - and we've travelled A LOT.  The Superior Overwater Bungalow was amazing, all of the staff amazing - and the location of the hotel is also prime.  Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Best resort in Moorea
reviews.text: Best resort in the island...the lagoon is blue, full of fish, rooms are amazing...the luxury beach bungalow is the best! We stayed in another resort and moved here because of the location...everything amazing!

reviews.title: Nice but a lot of lessons learned
reviews.positives: Great snorkeling - nice staff - beautiful rooms and villas
reviews.negatives: Mosquitos at the main dinner site (need citronella candles).  No points on my Accor account if booked through booking.com.   Much more benefits directly to Accor members - I regret booking through Booking.com

reviews.title: The best
reviews.text: Easy of access. Great and friendly staff. Food is amazing. One of the best hotel I have been to. I would say great to relax and rest with some options for exploration.

reviews.title: proximity to ferry made the hotel convenient for an overnight stay. Would not recomend as a holiday
reviews.positives:
Great Restaurant and bar. Great location.
Room was good ( not great) and facilities were limited. .
reviews.negatives: Soaps bottles in shower did not work.

reviews.title: Honeymooners from New Zealand
reviews.text: We stayed in room 212 overwater bungalow. It was incredible!! The water and snorkling from our bungalow was amazing. Best beach and resort on the island. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Excellent facilities.

reviews.title: Breathtaking paradise, some areas for improvement
reviews.positives: A breathtaking location with gorgeous water and views all around. We stayed in an overwater bungalow and it was magical. You can go straight into the blue water from your deck. The rooms were very clean and the staff decorated our room for our honeymoon and supplied us with some champagne to celebrate. The rooms are a bit dated but it sounds like they will be updating them in 2026. The majority of the staff were very friendly although not always as attentive as they should be in this type of resort. The food was mostly good, some area for improvement with breakfast (runny eggs, etc) but overall decent. The staff also restock the fridge every day which was nice. The snorkeling equipment is complimentary and snorkeling in the lagoon was incredible! This is really the type of place you think of when you think paradise!
reviews.negatives: There are multiple areas for improvement especially considering this is an expensive luxury resort. The check in/checkout process is long especially if checking in/out at the designated times. They should really have some type of shuttle service to get folks to and from the ferry port considering this is where most people are coming and departing from. This is a luxury resort so we expected increased prices for food/drink but some of the prices seemed absurd (ie $7 USD for a small Coca Cola, $40 USD for a medium mediocre pizza, etc). Rooms could also use microwaves to reheat leftovers. Overall the service and experience could be improved but the location is spectacular.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Cafard dans la chambre beaucoup de poussière  , bangalow avec pas mal de vis à vis aucune intimité … 
Seul point fort : l’emplacement et la plage

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location is absolutely beautiful and breakfast was good.
reviews.negatives: The rooms and facilities are very tired. I knows French Polynesia is expensive but for almost $900 a night the rooms and facilities really need an update.

reviews.title: Superbe emplacement et accueil parfait
reviews.text: Séjour absolument parfait, bungalow au top, emplacement exceptionnel. Mais surtout tout le personnel aux petits soins. Sourire, partage d’expériences personnelles sur l’île, toujours un mot gentil, de la femme de ménage aux personnels d’accueil ou du restaurant…vraiment merci à vous.

reviews.title: location is wonderful, food could be better
reviews.positives: location, cleaness
reviews.negatives: Luau buffet was not that good - overall the food could use improvment

reviews.title: Mittelmäßig
reviews.text: Preis und Leistung stimmen nicht überein

reviews.title: Make sure you budget for food and drink.
reviews.positives: Free breakfast was good with the room, the view from the bungalows was awesome.
reviews.negatives: Prices on everything, food and beverages were astronomical high. Not having free transport to the town or stores so you can shop.

reviews.title: Gutes Hotel an schöner Lage mit SEHR freundlichem Personal
reviews.text:
Moorea ist recht teuer, das Sofitel hält sich noch in Grenzen, die Bungalows sind
hübsch am Strand angeordnet.
Das Personal ist äusserst freundlich und das Essen in Ordnung, ebenso das Frühstück.

reviews.title: Alles bestens
reviews.text: Alles bestens vor allem sehr nettes Personal

reviews.title: Pretty location - poor food and staff!!
reviews.positives: Lovely location - nice beaches & pool area.
reviews.negatives: Staff at reception…rude!! And waited way too long to check in - then I was told I could not have my key until later in the day, but that I could just go to the desk and pick it up directly. But they made me wait in line yet again to pick up the key in the afternoon, which was super frustrating!! Did not respond to a single request I made online - it was as if I hadn’t  even  contacted them…requested a bungalow close to facilities - was given a location at far end of pier!!! Nearly 1/2 mile walk one way to get to restaurants etc!!! Attitudes were condescending and rude….!!! Food overall was NOT GOOD - For the money- disappointed!!

reviews.title: Overpriced, not worth the money they ask
reviews.text:
Good:
- Beach and water are amazing
- Room are spacious 
- Free Minibar get restocked once a day (2 beers, 2 still water, 2 sparkling water, 1 juice, 1 coke and 1 sprite)
Bad:
- Cockroaches and other insect in the room as shower has a door to the garden with a gap at the bottom
- Breakfast was fine but all the birds jumping on the tables eating wasn’t great 
- Around the resort have nothing, the street is dangerous to walk by foot. Without a vehicle can’t go anywhere if not stuck there for the all time
- Agoda website say that have gym on site which is in construction, disappointed about it 
- Food in the restaurant is very expensive and portions are small

Overall experience we did enjoy the private beach but not worth paying $1000 AUD at night. Must have a vehicle to move around and the cockroach around killed the mood.

reviews.title: Amazing beach location, but not worth the price.
reviews.positives: Beach front location was stunning.
reviews.negatives: Food was very underwhelming and definitely not worth the price. Given the location and without a car, being subject to the menu offerings is pretty torturous. Pool tiles were breaking. Obviously the location is amazing but overall the facilities and staff were just mediocre and not at the 5 star level. Would definitely not stay again or recommend to anyone given the cost to experience ratio.

reviews.title: Per quello che si paga, non ne vale la pena.
reviews.text:
Innegabile che la struttura è posizionata sulla spiaggia più bella dell'isola, ma per quello che si paga non è catalogabile come un 5*.
Il personale non è attento alle esigenze del cliente, la colazione è invasa da uccellini che mangiano dal buffet, veramente poco igienico, Wi-fi nelle camere non funziona.

Piuttosto che gli overwater consiglio i bungalow vista mare: sono direttamente sul mare e costano la metà degli overwater.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I think the location and beach were great.
reviews.negatives:
I felt that the food options could be better at the dining facility. For example, my gf is vegetarian and does not eat a lot, so she would not get the value of paying for the morning breakfast or the dinner.  

Also, the reception area could be very much improved to make it comfortable, especially for those who have to wait a long time to check in or for their flight.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: ห้องสวย แต่เริ่มเก่าแล้ว เตียงเป็นมุ้งโรแมนติกมากๆคับ ทะเลสวยน้ำใส ปลาเยอะมาก

reviews.title: It was end of our trip to French Polynesia so we had a nice stay so only stayed 2 nights- was expensive but loved locati
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Understaffed and some deferred maintenance- limited food options

reviews.title: 신혼여행
reviews.text: 너무 만족한 신혼여행이었습니다. 직원들 친절하고 냉장고에있는 음료도 공짜라 맘편히 마시게되네요. 자주오고 싶은 곳입니다

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything

reviews.title: The Sofitel was exceptional! It made our honeymoon truly special!
reviews.positives: spacious rooms; snorkeling right under the overwater bungalows; included breakfast; service.

reviews.title: Fabulous over the water experience! Bucket list item ☑️
reviews.positives:
Love that your bags are brought to your room. The staff lets you know when your room is ready. The open air restaurant. Is wonderful! 
Loved the overwater bungalow. Enjoyed going right into the water from my room. 
Loved that we could order from the restaurant and enjoy the food from our terrace!
reviews.negatives: The resort was showing some signs of wear. We arrived during some renovations - looking forward to the results!

reviews.title: Beautiful island and great location
reviews.positives: Location, property
reviews.negatives: cost of food/drink

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Oceanfront, great snorkeling! Great staff and concierge!!
reviews.negatives: It’s a bit dated for the price!

reviews.title: I completely recommend this hotel.
reviews.positives: What went well you ask?  Everything went well.  Great breakfast, great over the water hut, great snorkling, great sunrises and weather; great bar and service; same with other meals, excellent location - just wonderful.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.  Hotel was excellent!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Amazing location, outstanding breakfast. Very romantic private beach
reviews.negatives: Gym was pretty but small

reviews.title: Amazing water
reviews.positives: We loved the bungalows and crystal clear water with amazing snorkeling
reviews.negatives: Internet research

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.positives: Great staff and location!
reviews.negatives: Perfect

reviews.title: Beautiful coral reef. Very nice staff.
reviews.positives: Snorkeling was great. Staff very friendly.
reviews.negatives: They ran out of pool towels. Sometimes service was a little slow in the restaurants.

reviews.title: The best lagoon on the island, attentive staff, would definitely recommend and woupd be glad to come back!
reviews.positives: Beautiful location and beautiful lagoon.
reviews.negatives: The food was not as great as in some other places in French Polynesia, but the service and location made it still an amazing experience.

reviews.title: Peaceful way to spend some time in moorea
reviews.positives: It was really cool! You can see its growing oñd but the location, the staff, the lagoon, and the general vibe was amazing
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Worth the splurge
reviews.positives: Spectacular. Beautiful water, beautiful accommodations and wonderful staff.

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.positives: Perfect location and excellent breakfast
reviews.negatives: It was all wonderful

reviews.title: The quintessential Moorea resort
reviews.positives: A more beautiful spot can’t be found: THE classic spot on Moorea. Rooms and facilities are spectacular and comfy. Whether you’re in a garden, beachfront or “over water” hut, you’re only steps away from spectacular snorkeling and the gorgeous waters
reviews.negatives: For an international resort, they need to have more / better trained staff who are fully competent in English. But, it’s a minor consideration. Also, as so much in Polynesia is cash based, the front desk really should have French Polynesian Francs available for exchange, or a local bank ATM in the lobby.

reviews.title: Our stay was wonderful!
reviews.positives: The beautiful setting. The amazing beach. Space does not feel over crowded

reviews.title: Most beautiful luxurious stay, everything is done for you and all you have to do is rest and relax.
reviews.positives: Luxury stay, most beautiful place to stay at
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The hotel was simply beautiful. The breakfast was great. Lunch and dinner were not exceptional. I loved being right on the ocean and  getting up in the morning and snorkeling
reviews.negatives: I was very unhappy when I wanted to take a taxi to the Hilton and was told that it would cost $45 each way. That’s pretty outrageous. I didn’t like feeling stuck at the hotel because it was so costly to leave. No options.
